posts.title: Why Technology Still Needs Humanity
posts.intent_statement: Explore whether technology can amplify human judgment without replacing agency.
posts.central_question: Can a tool extend human judgment without quietly replacing it?
posts.core_insight: Technology becomes meaningful when joined to context, judgment, and care.

posts.title: Reading as an Active Operation
posts.intent_statement: Argue that reading should become an operation the reader performs, not content the reader receives.
posts.central_question: What changes if a page can be thought with, not just read?
posts.core_insight: The unit of reading shifts from the page to the passage you choose to act on.

posts.title: Time Is the Honest Axis
posts.intent_statement: Hold that the vertical axis must represent chronological truth and nothing else.
posts.central_question: What does the vertical line mean?
posts.core_insight: Mixing semantic distance into the time axis makes both unreadable.

posts.title: The Cost of Frictionless
posts.intent_statement: Warn that automating judgment away can degrade the meaning it was meant to serve.
posts.central_question: What gets removed when we remove every step?
posts.core_insight: Some friction is the place where taste and intent actually live.

posts.title: A Journal Is a Field, Not a List
posts.intent_statement: Reframe the archive as a temporal field of meaning rather than a stack of posts.
posts.central_question: How does an archive remember instead of forget?
posts.core_insight: Old entries are not buried; they are the ground the new ones stand on.

posts.title: Provenance Before Persuasion
posts.intent_statement: Insist that generated text must be visibly distinct from authored prose, always.
posts.central_question: What makes a generated sentence trustworthy?
posts.core_insight: Trust comes from seeing where a thought came from, not from how smooth it reads.

posts.title: Tools That Return Attention
posts.intent_statement: Define a good tool as one that returns the reader's attention rather than consuming it.
posts.central_question: What is the right thing to measure a tool by?
posts.core_insight: Measure a tool by the attention it gives back, not the time it captures.

posts.title: You Are Here
posts.intent_statement: Propose a single fixed marker for 'now' through which all content flows.
posts.central_question: Where do you stand when you are reading time?
posts.core_insight: One stable point of attention is calmer than a marker that chases the page.
